title: System, method, and apparatus for providing a collaborative social network
abstract: An approach is provided for a collaborative social network. A collaborative social network platform receives a request to create a collaborative profile for a user, wherein the collaborative profile is presented on a social network. The collaborative social network platform determines one or more peer users associated with the user. The collaborative social network platform then presents a user interface for access by the one or more peer users, wherein the user interface provides one or more user interface elements for the one or more peer users to provide content for the collaborative profile. The collaborative social network platform then aggregates the content provided by the one or more users via the user interface in the collaborative profile.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A method comprising: receiving a request to create a collaborative profile for a user, wherein the collaborative profile is presented on a social network; determining one or more peer users associated with the user; presenting a user interface for access by the one or more peer users, wherein the user interface provides one or more user interface elements for the one or more peer users to provide content for the collaborative profile; and aggregating the content provided by the one or more users via the user interface in the collaborative profile. 2. A method of claim 1, wherein the collaborative profile is associated with a business context, the method further comprising: receiving an input from the one or more peer users via the user interface, wherein the input includes content information describing a work history of the user, describing one or more responsibilities associated with the work history, describing one or more accomplishments associated with the work history, or a combination thereof. 3. A method of claim 2, further comprising: receiving an input from the one or more peer users via the user interface for adding one or more skill attributes to the collaborative profile, for rating the one or more skill attributes, or a combination thereof, or a combination thereof. 4. A method of claim 3, further comprising: sorting the one or more skill attributes based on the rating of the one or more skill attributes by the one or more peer users; and initiating a presentation of the one or more skill attributes based on the sorting. 5. A method of claim of 4, wherein the presentation of the one or more skill attributes includes presenting rating information associated with the one or more skill attributes. 6. A method according to any of claims 1-5, wherein the one or more peer users, the user, or a combination thereof are associated via one or more relationship levels. 7. A method of claim 6, further comprising: receiving an input from the one or more peer users via the user interface for rating the one or more relationship levels, one or more factors associated with the one or more relationship levels, or a combination thereof. 8. A method of claim 7, further comprising: determining a quality score for the collaborative profile based on the one or more relationship levels of the one or more peer users, the rating of the one or more relationship levels, the one or more factors associated with the one or more relationship levels, or a combination thereof; and initiating a presentation of a representation of the quality score for the collaborative profile. 9. A method according to any of claims 7 and 8, wherein the rating of the one or more relationship levels is based on a numerical scale. 10. A method of claim 9, wherein a higher number on the numerical scale indicates a closer relationship level. 11. A method according to any of claim 9 and 10, wherein the numerical scale is specified for a collaborative network or a community of collaborative networks. 12. A method according to any of claims 1-11, wherein the collaborative profile includes one or more content categories; and wherein the one or more content categories include a 

 biography category, a work history category, a skills category, a network category, or a combination thereof. 13. A method according to any of claims 1-12, further comprising: receiving a request from a first one of the one or more peer users or the user to a second one of the one or more peer users or the user to edit the collaborative profile; and initiating a transmission of an invitation to the second one of the one or more peer users or the user based on the request, wherein an access to the user interface by the second one of the one or more peer users or the user is based on the invitation. 14. A method according to any of claims 1-13, further comprising: partitioning the collaborative profile into a public portion and a private portion, wherein the public portion is accessible by all users and the private portion is accessible by one or more users meeting predetermined criteria. 15. A method of claim 14, wherein the public portion includes work history information without descriptive content, one or more top skills, or a combination thereof. 16. A method according to any of claims 1-15, further comprising: receiving an input from the one or more peer users via the user interface for editing the collaborative profile; presenting the input to the user for an approval; and initiating an update of the collaborative profile using the input based on the approval. 17. A method according to any of claims 1-16, further comprising: receiving an input from the one or more peer users via the user interface for specifying relationship information between the user and one of the one or more peer users; and determining whether to include or exclude the one of the one or more peer users based on the relationship information. 18. A method of claim 17, wherein the determination of whether to include or exclude the one of the one or more peer users is based on a number of the one or more peer users providing the relationship information. 19. A method according to any of claims 1-18, further comprising: determining relationship level information for the one or more peer users providing an input for editing the collaborative profile; determining a weight for the input based on the relationship level information; and updating the collaborative profile based on the input and the weight. 20. A method of claim 19, further comprising: determining a degree of overlap between a first social network associated with the user and a second social network associated with the one or more peer users providing the input, wherein the updating of the collaborative profile is further based on the degree of overlap. 21. An apparatus comprising: at least one processor; and at least one memory including computer program code for one or more programs, the at least one memory and the computer program code configured to, with the at least one processor, cause the apparatus to perform at least the following, request a request to create a collaborative profile for a user, wherein the collaborative profile is presented on a social network; determine one or more peer users associated with the user; present a user interface for access by the one or more peer users, wherein the user interface provides one or more user interface elements for the one or more peer users to provide content for the collaborative profile; and aggregate the content provided by the one or more users via the user interface in the collaborative profile. 22. An apparatus of claim 21, wherein the collaborative profile is associated with a business context, and wherein the apparatus is further caused to perform at least the following: receive an input from the one or more peer users via the user interface, wherein the input includes content information describing a work history of the user, describing one or more responsibilities associated with the work history, describing one or more accomplishments associated with the work history, or a combination thereof. 23. An apparatus of claim 22, wherein the apparatus is further caused to perform at least the following: receive an input from the one or more peer users via the user interface for adding one or more skill attributes to the collaborative profile, for rating the one or more skill attributes, or a combination thereof, or a combination thereof. 24. An apparatus of claim 23, wherein the apparatus is further caused to perform at least the following: sort the one or more skill attributes based on the rating of the one or more skill attributes by the one or more peer users; and initiate a presentation of the one or more skill attributes based on the sorting. 25. An apparatus of claim of 24, wherein the presentation of the one or more skill attributes includes presenting rating information associated with the one or more skill attributes. 26.
